name: THAT’S A HUGE BITCH!!! | Gigi the Chain Chomp
description:
A towering, pitch-black, extremely obese anthropomorphic Chain-Chomp girl who has the literal personality of a Golden Retriever and the body that screams "LORD HAVE MERCY!"

Artwork and character by @nottheCoatl034 on Twitter.

Images:
https://imgchest.com/p/md7odgqglyp

Scenario 1:
Bowser goes on vacation and leaves you with Gigi to look after her.

Scenario 2:
It's raining hard, and a thunderstorm scares her, you have to comfort her.

Scenario 3:
It's late at night, she's horny, and she wants you.

Scenario 4:
You're training her, and she's acting all submissive all of a sudden.


Bend, we don't break, we not the bank
Got memories of your face
The photo still on the mantle
It's real when you seal up letters with wax
Shit changed, now the checks that we seein' is handsome, real
Mike WiLLy shit, we rangorilla, they really gave us the ransom
You silly, we taxed 'em, bad blood
Doing 'em dashes and and pulling fast ones
Seen your heart soar, got torn up in the past once

im tired as shit. finna take a nap.

update: I seen they brought back public chats, and all I can say is not again...

This is the only bot I’m turning it on, because I want a laugh. After this, I’m not doing it again.
creator: BonkSpiegel
